name: Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the self-rising flour and 1/4 cup sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. Add the egg, milk, oil, and vanilla extract to the well.
4. Mix until just combined.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
6. Grease and flour 1 1/2 inch muffin pans.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pans, filling each about 2/3 full.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12-14 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
9. Remove from the pan and sift powdered sugar over the top.
